augment.policy: AUGMENT, not replace (Phase 39.5-01): vendor real OpenTabs src and preserve the hand-authored-only apps

skipped.grafana: real upstream grafana has empty urlPatterns (self-hosted); the hand-authored grafana.com slice is PRESERVED instead, so grafana stays covered -- real grafana NOT vendored over it
skipped.sqlpad: real upstream sqlpad has empty urlPatterns (self-hosted) and has no hand-authored slice -> simply not vendored

augment.note: Real-app provenance (source: 'opentabs') is filled into catalog/descriptors/_fixtures/_provenance.json by the frozen importer (fillProvenance) at Plan 39.5-04 run time. This vendor-side file records ONLY the augment policy + the 13 hand-authored-only no-upstream markers below, so they are never mistaken for real-source. Real-app descriptor lists are intentionally NOT pre-populated here.
